programme.title: Order of One: Kung Fu Killing Spree
programme.desc: Sonny, an escaped convict, and his unwilling cohort Ross Conroy, stand in the way of the city’s crime lord - Mr. Park, and his desire to possess the ultimate talisman: The Sword of Destiny. Forged from the spear that pierced the side of Jesus on the Cross, the sword gives unspeakable power to whomever touches it. But, in trying to achieve his nefarious goal to use the sword’s power to control everything in his path, Park underestimates the tenacity of Sonny and Ross. Soon the heroic duo are challenged by all of Park’s forces, including his nephew Tommy, the killer trio known as the Three Blind Mice and the beautiful but ruthless and deadly combination of the Sirens, Dynamite and Butterfly. Sonny and Ross have one mission before their luck runs out: to get the sword to The Order for safekeeping. The fate of The Sword, and all who come in contact with it, is in their hands.

programme.title: Crowbar: The Killings of Wendell Graves
programme.desc: In the small town of Coburg, a young boy named Wendell Graves witnesses the brutal murder of his parents in their own bedroom. He watches in horror as a masked man stabs the couple repeatedly with a crowbar. Wendell escapes and spends the next 15 years of his life silently locked up in his aunt's farmhouse. There she plays the innocent caretaker, brainwashing him into believing that anyone and everyone who enters his parents' home is an intruder who must meet the same fate as they did. When newcomers Alex and Veronica move to town, they have no idea the fate that awaits them. On the first night in their new home, Wendell returns to destroy the intruders. After slashing his way through Veronica's friends, Wendell disappears into the night leaving Alex and Veronica searching for answers. Receiving no help from the people who live in the strange town, Alex and Veronica discover the tragic past that threatens to swallow them as it has so many before. Wendell Graves follows them at every turn and when Alex and Veronica split up to find the answers, Alex discovers that they were lured to town by a sociopathic real estate agent. Fearing the worst, Alex races against time to find his wife before it's too late. Crowbar is a thrilling slasher film in the vein of Halloween and Psycho that dives deep into the psyche of jealousy and hatred.

programme.title: Arkham Sanitarium: Soul Eater
programme.desc: Arkham Sanitarium stood vacant for years after a sex and death cult were apprehended for committing heinous sadistic acts with special needs patients. The Legend of Arkham grew and many paranormal investigators attempted to investigate but couldn't last the night. Now a married duo of experienced Paranormal specialists and their crew, find themselves trapped and having to band together to battle malevolent forces from another dimension as they grapple with the very real creatures and nightmares created by HP Lovecraft. Fighting abominations and malevolent spirits from beyond, they battle for their sanity, their lives and ultimately the life of planet earth.

programme.title: Ghost Attack on Sutton Street: Poltergeists and Paranormal Entities
programme.desc: Expert Ghost Hunters from Haunted Events UK search for life-after death in the notoriously haunted Old Street Market of Sutton Town in historic old England. The area is so haunted that within minutes the investigation's medium is contacted by not one, but four spirits, warning them not to split up or risk their lives.Ignoring the advice, they split into two teams. The first team lead by UK Paranormal Expert Lee Roberts, comes face to face with the child murderer named Tap Tap, who taunts them with noises and poltergeist activity. Team two uses thermal imaging cameras to pick up humanoid forms and warm hand prints, further witnessing their devices shockingly moved before their eyes, chairs tipping over, tables levitating, glasses thrown and doors slamming. The nightbecomes so terrifying that the hunt is called off, but not before one final terrifying incident. You have never witnessed a ghost hunt like this before. Blair Witch was a movie. This is real. Prepare yourselves for the most shocking Ghost Hunt ever recorded.

programme.title: Blue World Ep402: Bull Sharks in Mexico + NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab
programme.desc: Blue World travels to Mexico for an up-close encounter with Bull sharks and then visits NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston where astronauts train underwater for space walking.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep103: Mysterious Tentacles
programme.desc: Mysterious Tentacles follows Dr. Jennifer Mather as she leads a team of renowned scientists to the beautiful Caribbean island of Bonaire. Their mission is to prove a controversial theory: reef squid speak to each other with a complex language they paint on their skin.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Step into the heart of innovation with The Big Reveal! Join Sheriff Mark Lamb and MMA legend Ken Shamrock as they explore groundbreaking American companies revolutionizing their industries. From elite camo designed through deer vision science to lightweight titanium firearm suppressors and EMF-neutralizing tech for peak performance—each story uncovers passion, ingenuity, and grit. Discover what’s shaping America’s entrepreneurial spirit. It’s not just business. It’s The Big Reveal.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: In this episode, the contestants are off and running, putting what they've learned so far into practice and reaping the rewards. Now it's your turn! Learn what these pros have been learning and how you can use it to improve the value of your home and the safety and happiness of your life.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 211: Open #6 Preview, Doubles Storylines to Watch, and Too High or Too Low Rankings Open #6 is here, and Around the ACL is getting you ready for everything to watch. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony break down the Singles field—who’s trending, who’s dangerous, and where the biggest runs could come from. Then it’s all about Doubles, as we look at key teams, potential breakout pairs, and which duos could make serious noise this weekend. To close it out, we bring back a fan-favorite debate segment: Too High or Too Low. Are some of the current rankings where they should be—or way off? We take a closer look at names like Matt Guy, the duo of Koby Costanza / Tommy Sliker, and Sarah Cassidy / Matt Wilson—and give our honest takes. Predictions, pressure points, and plenty of debate—this one sets the stage for Open #6.
